example: Please **look at** the blackboard.
Can you **look at** the picture?
I am **ready to** start the lesson.
Vegetables are **good for** your health.
**Welcome to** the unit on school life.
Let's start **by getting to know each other**.
We use the **simple present tense** for daily routines.
**What do you like to** do in your free time?
Can you name some **places at school**?
Welcome to **our wonderful school**!
**Welcome to** our classroom.
We learn **prepositions of time** in this lesson.
**Adverbs of frequency** show how often something happens.
We can eat **all kinds of food** in the cafeteria.
Nouns can be **countable or uncountable**.
Different countries have **gifts around the world**.
We should **be wise with money** when shopping.
**Using there be** to describe existence.
We celebrate **festivals around the world**.
I am **meeting my new** classmates today.
The library is one of the **great places at school**.
We believe in **learning by doing**.
There are **different types of** books in the library.
This unit is **all about money** and spending.
There are many **festivals for the** whole family.
**Millie and her new classmates** are in Class 1.
**In this unit**, we will learn about school life.

phrase: This is our first day at
example: **This is our first day at** middle school.

meaning: 这里有一些来自...的学生
example: **Here are some students from** Class 1, Grade 7.
Please **read what they say** carefully.
**Daniel is my** best friend at school.
**Please greet and introduce** yourself to the class.
**You can call me** Millie.
My **Chinese name is** 李明.
**Millie is greeting** her new teacher.
Please **work in pairs** to practice the dialogue.

phrase: Greet your partner and then introduce
meaning: 问候你的搭档然后介绍
example: **Greet your partner and then introduce** yourself.

phrase: Use the conversation below as a
example: **Use the conversation below as a** model.

phrase: The sentences in the box may
example: **The sentences in the box may** help you.
**The same goes for** your partner.
**Nice to meet you**, too!
I'm **glad to meet you too**!
**Which class are you in**?
**Do you have any** questions?
I like reading. **What about you**?

phrase: What other greetings do you know
meaning: 你还知道哪些其他问候语
example: **What other greetings do you know**?

phrase: Think of a different greeting and
meaning: 想一个不同的问候语并...
example: **Think of a different greeting and** share it.

phrase: Millie is introducing herself and her
example: **Millie is introducing herself and her** hobbies.
